<think> I know that the series of books about Geralt of Rivia is based on a popular video game, The Witcher. I also know that the books were written by a Polish author. I recall that the author of the book series is a well-known Polish fantasy author. I remember that the author's name is associated with the fantasy genre and has written many popular books, including the Witcher series. I believe the author's name is Andrzej Sapkowski. He is a renowned Polish fantasy author, and his works have been widely acclaimed. I am certain that he is the author of Baptism of Fire, the third novel in the Witcher series. </think>
<answer> Andrzej Sapkowski </answer>
